records.m_Talk_ENG: Counters Legacy's Ground One server just launched today.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Counters Legacy's Ground One server just launched today.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Counters Legacy's Ground One server just launched today.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The number of active users in Ground One is increasing, and it's our greatest achievement yet!

records.m_Talk_FRA: The number of active users in Ground One is increasing, and it's our greatest achievement yet!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Any students who wish to join can let me know at anytime.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Any students who wish to join can let me know at anytime.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's finally time! For me, Naielle Bluesteel, to make my name known to the public!

records.m_Talk_FRA: It's finally time! For me, Naielle Bluesteel, to make my name known to the public!
